containers.passiveCard:
Basic effect(s)
  • Can perform Reversible Exchange with Goku (Ultra Instinct)
  • Ki +5
  • ATK 300%
  • DEF 200%
  • Damage reduction rate 20%
  • Launches an additional Super Attack
  •  Damage reduction rate 74%
For every attack received
  • Damage reduction rate 4% (up to 20%)
  • ATK & DEF 40% (up to 300%)
  • Chance of performing a critical hit 10% (up to 50%)
As the 1st attacker in a turn
  • ATK 200%
  • Performs a critical hit
  • Damage reduction rate 20%
  • Attack effective against all types
  • Guards all attacks for 3 turns
  • Launches an additional Super Attack
When facing only 1 enemy
  • Launches an additional Super Attack
  • ATK 50% for every attack received whithin the turn
When attacking with 24 Ki
  • ATK 200%
  • Chance of performing critical hit 66%
After Performing 10 or more attacks in battle
  • ATK 200%
  • Nullifies negative effects
  • Launches an additional Super Attack
  • Disables targeted enemy's action once within the turn
For every Super Attack the enemy launches at the character
  • ATK 200%
  • DEF 25%
At the start of each turn
  • ATK 100%
  • DEF 50%
